title: Oportun to Report Second Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT), a fintech company, announced it will release its second quarter 2024 financial results on Thursday, August 8, 2024, after market close. The company will host a conference call and webcast on the same day at 5:00 pm ET / 2:00 pm PT. Investors can access the live presentation through Oportun's investor relations website at investor.oportun.com, with replay availability for one year. Participants may dial in using 1-866-604-1698 (toll-free) or 1-201-389-0844 (international). On the announcement date, OPRT stock declined 1.83%, indicating a mild negative investor response to the earnings notification. Oportun describes itself as a mission-driven fintech offering borrowing, savings, and budgeting services to members seeking improved financial outcomes.
